tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies WebSocket connectivity to backend.

tools.name: get-project
tools.description: Get detailed information about a project, including its board columns with their IDs.

tools.name: list-projects
tools.description: List all projects in a workspace.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID (optional, defaults to current workspace)

tools.name: get-task
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific task by its ID.

tools.name: list-tasks
tools.description: List tasks in a project with optional filters by column, status, assignee, or tags.

projectId.description: The project ID to list tasks from

tags.description: Filter by tags — returns tasks that have ALL specified tags (optional)

tools.name: list-board-agents
tools.description: List all agents in the workspace that have access to board-manager or board-runner apps, including their role (manager, runner, or both).

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID (optional, defaults to current workspace)

tools.name: create-project
tools.description: Create a new project with an associated Kanban board in a workspace.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID to create the project in (optional, defaults to current workspace)

tools.name: create-task
tools.description: Create a new task on a project board. Defaults to backlog column.

assignedAgentId.description: Agent ID to assign the task to

columnId.description: Column ID to place the task in (default: backlog)

tools.name: batch-create-tasks
tools.description: Create multiple tasks at once on a project board. Atomic operation — all succeed or all fail. Max 100 tasks.

tasks.description: Array of task objects to create

tools.name: update-task
tools.description: Update task properties (title, description, priority, tags).

tools.name: update-task-status
tools.description: Update the semantic status of a task. Status is decoupled from column position. When set to "review" or "done", the task is automatically moved to the matching column.

tools.name: move-task
tools.description: Move a task to a different column on the board.

position.description: Position within the column (optional, defaults to end)

tools.name: assign-task
tools.description: Assign or unassign an agent to a task. Pass null or omit agentId to unassign.

agentId.description: Agent ID to assign (omit or null to unassign)

tools.name: start-task
tools.description: Start a task: moves it to in_progress, creates a headless conversation with the assigned agent, sends the task description as the initial message, and links the conversation to the task. Optionally override the assigned agent or provide a custom prompt.

agentId.description: Optional agent ID override. If provided, the task will be reassigned to this agent before starting.

prompt.description: Optional custom prompt to send to the agent instead of the default task description message.

tools.name: link-conversation
tools.description: Link an existing conversation to a task. Replaces any previously linked conversation.

channelId.description: The conversation channel ID to link

tools.name: add-progress-note
tools.description: Add a progress note to a task. Use this to post updates about what you are doing on a task. Progress notes are visible in the task detail and on the board.

taskId.description: The task ID to add a note to

tools.name: delete-task
tools.description: Delete a task from the board. Sub-tasks become top-level tasks. Linked conversations are NOT deleted.

tools.name: add-task-dependency
tools.description: Add a dependency between two tasks. After this call, taskId depends on dependsOnTaskId (i.e. dependsOnTaskId must be completed before taskId can start). Cycle detection is performed automatically — if adding the dependency would create a cycle, an error is returned and the affected tasks are marked with status `circular_dependency`.

taskId.description: The task that gains the new dependency (the dependent task)

dependsOnTaskId.description: The task that taskId will depend on (must be completed first)

tools.name: remove-task-dependency
tools.description: Remove a dependency between two tasks. After this call, taskId no longer depends on dependsOnTaskId. This operation is idempotent — if the dependency does not exist, the task is returned unchanged.

taskId.description: The task that currently has the dependency

dependsOnTaskId.description: The task to remove from taskId's dependencies

tools.name: get-task-dependencies
tools.description: Get the dependencies of a task — i.e. the list of task IDs that must be completed before the given task can start. Returns the dependency task IDs and their count.

taskId.description: The task ID to get dependencies for
